title: Selecting Dividend Aristocrats Using SCHD's Methodology - Initial Results
text: I propose leveraging the stock selection criteria from the underlying index of SCHD to build a portfolio with a subset of Dividend Aristocrats. I am tracking two portfolios built using this process and comparing the results to NOBL and SCHD.

title: Cincinnati Financial: A Dividend King At A Favorable Valuation
text: Cincinnati is growing strongly, with 13% growth in premiums than in the same period last year. Investment income was also up 8% thanks to Fed rate hikes. As interest rates rose, the stock market declined, and Cincinnati's stock portfolio fell $674 million, causing total revenues to decline by 21% compared to the same period last year.

title: Cincinnati Financial: Some Upside Realized, More Upside Possible
text: I wrote about Cincinnati Financial back in August, and the company has stayed true to its dividend-king roots for that time, outperforming the market by significant amounts. I'm revisiting the company to see what upside there remains to this company, and there is some. 2022 is expected to be a down year.

title: This Dividend King Operates a Lot Like Berkshire Hathaway
text: Berkshire Hathaway, the conglomerate run by legendary investor Warren Buffett, has widely outperformed the market.

title: 3 Dividend Aristocrats That Will Keep Paying in 2023
text: The possibility of volatile market conditions next year has made dividend-paying stocks attractive.

title: 10 Companies Will Thrive During Next Year's Recession, Analysts
text: Recession is likely next year, at least according to the bond market. But some S&P 500 companies will skate right through it, analysts say.
